57616.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
57616.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

57617.title: 40 Super 80s Pop Hits!
57617.description: Everybody wants to rule the 80s Super Pop Hits list - but who will claim the No.1 spot? Keep watching... and remember, the only way... is up!

57619.title: Forever 80s
57619.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

57620.title: The Power Of 80s Love!
57620.description: The power of love is strong here at MTV which is why we've put all of the best 80s love songs together in one playlist!

57621.title: Electric 80s!
57621.description: Tune in as we play all of the biggest electronic hits from the 80s!

57622.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
57622.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV!

57623.title: ... So 80s!
57623.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
